vars.input: A typo in an internal CI log message; no user-facing surface and no data touched.
Updated a developer-only runbook page; no credential, billing, or user surface affected.
One customer's API key was accidentally written to an application log for several hours.
A single user's stored payment card failed to save, blocking their subscription for an hour.
A misconfigured query exposed many users' email addresses across multiple tenants for a day.
A webhook retry bug double-charged every active subscriber in one billing run.
A bad deploy logged out all users across three enterprise tenants and lost their unsaved work.
